classification.task_goal: Ensure the game area moves based on the initial window position and remains within the window boundaries.
primary_constraints: The game area must always be calculated relative to the initial window position.
The game area must remain within the boundaries of the game window.
classification.reasoning: The assistant initially provided code that did not ensure the game area remained within the window boundaries, leading to a user complaint. The assistant then provided a revised solution that included checks to keep the game area within the window, which the user accepted.
